Family-Owned. Community-Focused. Since 1989.

Hands-On Management for the Mid-Atlantic.

Tidewater Companies is a family-owned management firm serving 300+ HOA, condo, and rental communities across MD, DC, VA, PA, DE, and WV — with the same operational standard we’ve held for over 35 years.

For HOA & Condo Boards
Get a free management proposal
One-business-day callback from a regional manager who knows your area.
Request a proposal
For Homeowners
Owner portal & quick actions
Pay your assessment, submit a request, or log in to your community portal.

Association Management

Built for the way your board works.

Different communities have different mechanics, governing docs, and risk profiles. Our practice is structured around the two biggest.

HOA

HOA Management

Townhome associations, master-planned communities, and single-family HOAs across the Mid-Atlantic. Three service tiers — Full, Flex, and Financial Only.

  • Annual management plans & QA review
  • Vendor compliance & COI tracking
  • Real-manager after-hours emergency line
  • Board portal with real-time financial visibility
Explore HOA management
Condo

Condo Association Management

High-rise, mid-rise, and garden-style condominiums. Specialized in shared mechanical systems, complex reserves, and 24/7 resident expectations.

  • Reserve studies translated into action plans
  • Elevator, fire, HVAC management plans
  • Special-assessment communication frameworks
  • Building-system vendor pre-qualification
Explore condo management
300+ communities under management
6 states across the Mid-Atlantic

AAMC

PCAM Leadership

A+
A+ BBB Rating
Backed by 35+ years of work
Why Boards Choose Tidewater

Hands-on operations. No-surprises reporting.

01

A manager who knows your community

Average tenure across our management leadership exceeds a decade. The same person — not a rotating roster — runs your account.

02

A real human answers when it's 2am

After-hours line is answered by Tidewater community managers, not an answering service. 20-minute callback standard, every time.

03

Financials boards can actually read

Clean, board-readable monthly reports on the 1st. Real-time delinquency visibility via portal. Optional secondary invoice approval.

04

A second set of eyes on every plan

Annual management plans are tracked across the portfolio by our QA team — so deadlines, inspections, and renewals never slip past your manager.

“Still family-owned. Still independent. Still here.”

Stanley & Marc Greenberg
Who We Are

More than management.
Your trusted community resource.

Stanley Greenberg founded Tidewater in 1989. His son Marc — CMCA, AMS, PCAM — helped grow the company into a regional, full-service operation while keeping it family-owned. As regional competitors are acquired by national firms and private equity, we’ve stayed independent on purpose.

The way that translates: open-door ownership, accessible managers, and the kind of decisions only people who answer to their own neighborhood make.

35+
Years Independent
300+
Communities
~75
In-house Team
2
Generations Family-Owned
Voices From Our Communities

The way we work — everyday.

Request a Proposal

Let’s talk about your community.

Tell us a little about your association and a manager from your region will be in touch within one business day.

  • One-business-day response from a regional manager
  • Free, no-obligation proposal & transition timeline
  • Apples-to-apples comparison vs. your current company

Get a proposal

All fields are required. We’ll never share your information.

Or call (443) 548-0191 · 24/7 emergency line for current communities

Family-owned. Community-focused. Always moving forward. Hands-on management and personalized insight for the Mid-Atlantic since 1989.
